TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_laluma'an_nu_Takelian, title = laluma'an_nu_Takelian, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/laluma'an_nu_Takelian} }

S.FORM: laluma'an nu Takelian (Amilika: House Targaryen) u nisangaan ku dadiw nu sulda atu lamal nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u caay katenga a laluma'an. i Kingslanding atu Ba'tu nu Liw a subalmana'nel ku laluma'an nu Takelian, mikeliday tu Wiestros a lala' tu tuluway a lasubu a mihcaan. u kulit nu laluma'ana nu Takelian hananay, u situluway a tangagh a liw; u Ekun atu tusaay a sabana nu nida hananay. u kamu nu laluma'an: u lamal atu idang (izang). (Amikika a kamu: Fire and Blood.) laylay, lalangawan ata micidekay caay kaw u mana'nelay ku laluma'an nu Takelian; namakay nu waliyan i Baleyliya Eysos a tabakiay a lala' inaayaw, inuayaw a 12 a mihcaan satu nikalawpesan nu Baleyliya, namakatengil ci Inal Takelian tu naspi nu wawana nida, mulady tu laluma'an amin atu limaay a Liw patayda i Ba'tuan nu Liw a subal. inudikudan tu nikalawpesan ku cacay a mihcaan hananay sa, u madademecay ci Ekun ku saayaway, muladay tu hitay atu tuluway a Liw tayda i Kingslanding, malingatu tu mingangayawan tu pituway a kanatalay. caay kelecad ku laluma'an nu Takelian tu zumaay a laluma'an i Westeros hananay, mitengil tu nikamuwan ulic nu babalaki: malacawa ku lalumaan, calkakaan; maaepun tu kina caay kalecad a nikaulican. izaw(idaw) ku kamu tu nikasalunhanay nu laluma'an nu Takelian hananay: "caay kau tademaw a salunganay." izaw (idaw) ku micidekay nu heni hananay sa, namakayni pitudus nu babalakian malik tu calkakaan u katuuday nu dadiw nu sulda atu lamal. Pasaylis Tanilis sasaydan a Eymun Pulintun Leywen Ekun u katuuday a laluma'an nu laylay zumaay a nikatinengan "śĚÉŚäõÁöĄśłłśąŹ" ISBN 7-5366-7125-3 "ŚąóÁéčÁöĄÁļ∑šļČ" ISBN 978-7-5366-7425-7 "ŚÜįťõ®ÁöĄť£éśöī" ISBN 978-7-5366-8484-3 "Áĺ§ťł¶ÁöĄÁõõŚģī" ISBN 978-7-5366-9933-5 "ť≠ĒťĺôÁöĄÁčāŤąě"ISBN 7-229-05888-3 " " malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan ŚĖ¨ś≤Ľť¶¨šłĀŚÄčšļļÁ∂≤Áęô
S.PHON: r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian (amir~…ĺika: ńßous…ô targarj…ôn) u nisaŇčaan ku dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u ¶aaj kat…ôŇča a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. i kiŇčsr~…ĺandiŇč atu ba Ē~ °tu nu r~…ĺiw a subar~…ĺmana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian, mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu wi…ôstros a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu tur~…ĺuwaj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan. u kur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °ana nu tak…ôr~…ĺian ńßananaj, u situr~…ĺuwaj a taŇčagńß a r~…ĺiw; u …ôkun atu tusaaj a sabana nu nida ńßananaj. u kamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an: u r~…ĺamar~…ĺ atu idaŇč (izaŇč). (amikika a kamu: fir…ô and br~…ĺood.) r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ata mi ¶id…ôkaj ¶aaj kaw u mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian; namakaj nu war~…ĺijan i bar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺija …ôsos a tabakiaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° inaajaw, inuajaw a ** a mińß ¶aan satu nikar~…ĺawp…ôsan nu bar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺija, namakat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i inar~…ĺ tak…ôr~…ĺian tu naspi nu wawana nida, mur~…ĺadj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an amin atu r~…ĺimaaj a r~…ĺiw patajda i ba Ē~ °tuan nu r~…ĺiw a subar~…ĺ. inudikudan tu nikar~…ĺawp…ôsan ku ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan ńßananaj sa, u madad…ôm…ô ¶aj ¶i …ôkun ku saajawaj, mur~…ĺadaj tu ńßitaj atu tur~…ĺuwaj a r~…ĺiw tajda i kiŇčsr~…ĺandiŇč, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu miŇčaŇčajawan tu pituwaj a kanatar~…ĺaj. ¶aaj k…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian tu zumaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an i w…ôst…ôros ńßananaj, mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu nikamuwan ur~…ĺi ¶ nu babar~…ĺaki: mar~…ĺa ¶awa ku r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, ¶ar~…ĺkakaan; maa…ôpun tu kina ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a nikaur~…ĺi ¶an. izaw(idaw) ku kamu tu nikasar~…ĺunńßanaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian ńßananaj: " ¶aaj kau tad…ômaw a sar~…ĺuŇčanaj." izaw (idaw) ku mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ńß…ôni ńßananaj sa, namakajni pitudus nu babar~…ĺakian mar~…ĺik tu ¶ar~…ĺkakaan u katuudaj nu dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. pasajr~…ĺis tanir~…ĺis sasajdan a …ômun pur~…ĺintun r~…ĺ…ôw…ôn …ôkun u katuudaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj zumaaj a nikatin…ôŇčan "*****" isbn *-****-****-* "*****" isbn ***-*-****-****-* "*****" isbn ***-*-****-****-* "*****" isbn ***-*-****-****-* "*****"isbn *-***-*****-* " " mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ********
S.FORM: laluma'an nu Takelian (Amilika: House Targaryen) u nisangaan ku dadiw nu sulda atu lamal nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u caay katenga a laluma'an. i Kingslanding atu Ba'tu nu Liw a subalmana'nel ku laluma'an nu Takelian, mikeliday tu Wiestros a lala' tu tuluway a lasubu a mihcaan. u kulit nu laluma'ana nu Takelian hananay, u situluway a tangagh a liw; u Ekun atu tusaay a sabana nu nida hananay. u kamu nu laluma'an: u lamal atu idang (izang). (Amikika a kamu: Fire and Blood.) laylay, lalangawan ata micidekay caay kaw u mana'nelay ku laluma'an nu Takelian; namakay nu waliyan i Baleyliya Eysos a tabakiay a lala' inaayaw, inuayaw a 12 a mihcaan satu nikalawpesan nu Baleyliya, namakatengil ci Inal Takelian tu naspi nu wawana nida, mulady tu laluma'an amin atu limaay a Liw patayda i Ba'tuan nu Liw a subal. inudikudan tu nikalawpesan ku cacay a mihcaan hananay sa, u madademecay ci Ekun ku saayaway, muladay tu hitay atu tuluway a Liw tayda i Kingslanding, malingatu tu mingangayawan tu pituway a kanatalay. caay kelecad ku laluma'an nu Takelian tu zumaay a laluma'an i Westeros hananay, mitengil tu nikamuwan ulic nu babalaki: malacawa ku lalumaan, calkakaan; maaepun tu kina caay kalecad a nikaulican. izaw(idaw) ku kamu tu nikasalunhanay nu laluma'an nu Takelian hananay: "caay kau tademaw a salunganay." izaw (idaw) ku micidekay nu heni hananay sa, namakayni pitudus nu babalakian malik tu calkakaan u katuuday nu dadiw nu sulda atu lamal. Pasaylis Tanilis sasaydan a Eymun Pulintun Leywen Ekun u katuuday a laluma'an nu laylay zumaay a nikatinengan "śĚÉŚäõÁöĄśłłśąŹ" ISBN 7-5366-7125-3 "ŚąóÁéčÁöĄÁļ∑šļČ" ISBN 978-7-5366-7425-7 "ŚÜįťõ®ÁöĄť£éśöī" ISBN 978-7-5366-8484-3 "Áĺ§ťł¶ÁöĄÁõõŚģī" ISBN 978-7-5366-9933-5 "ť≠ĒťĺôÁöĄÁčāŤąě"ISBN 7-229-05888-3 " " malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan ŚĖ¨ś≤Ľť¶¨šłĀŚÄčšļļÁ∂≤Áęô
S.PHON: r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian (amir~…ĺika: ńßous…ô targarj…ôn) u nisaŇčaan ku dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u ¶aaj kat…ôŇča a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. i kiŇčsr~…ĺandiŇč atu ba Ē~ °tu nu r~…ĺiw a subar~…ĺmana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺ ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian, mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu wi…ôstros a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu tur~…ĺuwaj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan. u kur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °ana nu tak…ôr~…ĺian ńßananaj, u situr~…ĺuwaj a taŇčagńß a r~…ĺiw; u …ôkun atu tusaaj a sabana nu nida ńßananaj. u kamu nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an: u r~…ĺamar~…ĺ atu idaŇč (izaŇč). (amikika a kamu: fir…ô and br~…ĺood.) r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ata mi ¶id…ôkaj ¶aaj kaw u mana Ē~ °n…ôr~…ĺaj ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian; namakaj nu war~…ĺijan i bar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺija …ôsos a tabakiaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° inaajaw, inuajaw a ** a mińß ¶aan satu nikar~…ĺawp…ôsan nu bar~…ĺ…ôr~…ĺija, namakat…ôŇčir~…ĺ ¶i inar~…ĺ tak…ôr~…ĺian tu naspi nu wawana nida, mur~…ĺadj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an amin atu r~…ĺimaaj a r~…ĺiw patajda i ba Ē~ °tuan nu r~…ĺiw a subar~…ĺ. inudikudan tu nikar~…ĺawp…ôsan ku ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan ńßananaj sa, u madad…ôm…ô ¶aj ¶i …ôkun ku saajawaj, mur~…ĺadaj tu ńßitaj atu tur~…ĺuwaj a r~…ĺiw tajda i kiŇčsr~…ĺandiŇč, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu miŇčaŇčajawan tu pituwaj a kanatar~…ĺaj. ¶aaj k…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian tu zumaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an i w…ôst…ôros ńßananaj, mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu nikamuwan ur~…ĺi ¶ nu babar~…ĺaki: mar~…ĺa ¶awa ku r~…ĺar~…ĺumaan, ¶ar~…ĺkakaan; maa…ôpun tu kina ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a nikaur~…ĺi ¶an. izaw(idaw) ku kamu tu nikasar~…ĺunńßanaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu tak…ôr~…ĺian ńßananaj: " ¶aaj kau tad…ômaw a sar~…ĺuŇčanaj." izaw (idaw) ku mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ńß…ôni ńßananaj sa, namakajni pitudus nu babar~…ĺakian mar~…ĺik tu ¶ar~…ĺkakaan u katuudaj nu dadiw nu sur~…ĺda atu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. pasajr~…ĺis tanir~…ĺis sasajdan a …ômun pur~…ĺintun r~…ĺ…ôw…ôn …ôkun u katuudaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an nu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj zumaaj a nikatin…ôŇčan "*****" isbn *-****-****-* "*****" isbn ***-*-****-****-* "*****" isbn ***-*-****-****-* "*****" isbn ***-*-****-****-* "*****"isbn *-***-*****-* " " mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ********
